title: Outdoor Billboard Story Set
description: Extend one campaign idea into metro lightboxes, building screens, bus shelters, and event takeovers without losing clarity or impact.

zh-CN.title: 户外广告故事组图
zh-CN.description: 把一个宣发概念延展成地铁灯箱、公交站牌、商场大屏和活动主背景，让不同媒介上都保有清晰传播力。
